else{if(typeof value!=="undefined"&&value!==null){var separator=url.indexOf("?")!==-1?"&":"?";hash=url.split("#");url=hash[0]+separator+key+"="+value;if(typeof hash[1]!=="undefined"&&hash[1]!==null){url+="#"+hash[1];}
return url;}
else{return url;}}}

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><span style="color: #000000;"><strong>How to Use This Tool</strong></span></h2>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text"><strong>Step 1:</strong> Enter Your &#8220;<strong>Civil ID Number</strong>&#8221; in the provided box</span>.</li>



<li><strong>Step 2:</strong> Click on the &#8220;<strong>Submit</strong>&#8221; button.</li>



<li><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text" style="color: #000000;"><strong>Step 3: </strong>Move to the &#8220;<strong>official website</strong>&#8220;.</span></li>



<li><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text" style="color: #000000;"><strong>Step 4:</strong> Then Again Enter your <strong>details</strong>.</span></li>



<li><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text" style="color: #000000;"><strong>Step 5:</strong> Click on the &#8220;<strong>Submit</strong>&#8221; button</span></li>



<li><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text" style="color: #000000;"><strong>Step 6:</strong> Finally, You will see your &#8220;<strong>current status</strong>&#8220;</span></li>
</ul>



<p><span style="color: #000000;"></span></p>


<div class="kb-row-layout-wrap kb-row-layout-id2920_2bb89f-62 alignnone wp-block-kadence-rowlayout"><div class="kt-row-column-wrap kt-has-1-columns kt-row-layout-equal kt-tab-layout-inherit kt-mobile-layout-row kt-row-valign-top">

<p class="has-text-align-center has-theme-palette-9-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-00399199aa15cf1f957515dc46fa05a1">This site is connected to the official website. So don’t worry, your information is safe and secure.</p>
</div></div>

</div></div>


<p></p>



<p><span style="color: #000000;">If you have any problem checking your <strong>Kuwait Civil ID status</strong>, If yes, you are in a writing blog. we solve all your confusion about Kuwait civil id status in this article. please read the complete article.</span></p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><span style="color: #000000;"><strong>Kuwait Civil ID Status Check Through the PACI Website</strong></span></h2>



<p><span style="color: #000000;">The Public Authority for Civil Information (PACI) offers citizens, residents, and expatriates in Kuwait the possibility of obtaining their PACI</span> Kuwait Civil ID Status <span style="color: #000000;">by following its official website.</span></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text" style="color: #000000;"><strong>Step 1: </strong>Visit the <strong>official website</strong> of the <strong>Public Authority for Civil Information</strong>, Click the below <strong>button</strong>.</span></li>
</ul>

<li><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text" style="color: #000000;"><strong>Step 6:</strong> Then, on the official website <strong>see your current status</strong>.</span></li>
</ul>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Kuwait Civil ID Status Check Through the MOI Website</strong></h2>



<p>The Kuwait Civil ID check can be conducted on the website of the Public Authority for Civil Information (PACI) by entering your ID number to view your personal information and ID card expiration date. Your ID card can also be checked in person at a <strong>PACI Service center</strong>.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Step 1:&nbsp;</strong>Click on the&nbsp;<strong>button</strong>&nbsp;below to visit the&nbsp;<strong>official website</strong>&nbsp;of the Kuwaiti Ministry of Interior.</li>
</ul>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Kuwait Civil ID Status Check By MOI App</h2>



<p>Kuwait Civil ID Status Check MOI By App. MOI App is a mobile application developed by the Kuwaiti government of the Ministry of Interior. It offers a range of services related to residency and citizenship, including checking Civil ID status.</p>



<p>The civil ID status MOI app requires a Kuwaiti phone number and a civil ID number. The following steps will guide you through checking your Civil ID status on the MOI Kuwait app.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Step 1: Download the MOI App to Check your Civil ID Status</strong></h3>



<p>The civil ID status MOI app requires you to first download and install it on your mobile device to check the status of your civil ID. Here are the steps you need to follow:</p>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Download and Install the MOI App</strong></h4>

<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Step 2: Register for an Account</h3>



<p>After you download and install the civil ID status MOI app, you must create an account in order to check your civil ID status. The steps are as follows:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Open the&nbsp;<strong>MOI app</strong>&nbsp;on your mobile device.</li>



<li>Click on the “<strong>Register</strong>” button.</li>



<li>Please enter your&nbsp;<strong>Kuwait phone number</strong>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<strong>Civil ID number</strong>.</li>



<li>Then, wait for a message with a&nbsp;<strong>verification code</strong>&nbsp;to come to your phone.</li>



<li>The verification code must be entered in the app to complete the registration.</li>
</ul>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Step 3: Log in to the App</h3>



<p>Your civil ID status can be checked on the app only after you log in to your account. Here are the steps you need to follow:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Open the&nbsp;<strong>MOI app</strong>&nbsp;on your mobile device.</li>



<li>On the main menu, click the “<strong>Login</strong>” button.</li>



<li>Please enter your&nbsp;<strong>Kuwait phone number</strong>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<strong>password</strong>.</li>



<li>The “<strong>Login</strong>” button allows you to access your account.</li>
</ul>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Step 4: Check Your Civil ID Status</h3>



<p>Once you’ve logged into your MOI Kuwait app account, checking your Civil ID status is straightforward. Please follow the steps below:</p>

<li>During the&nbsp;<strong>Civil ID status check</strong>, you will be asked for your&nbsp;<strong>Civil ID number</strong>&nbsp;and date of birth. You must enter the correct information.</li>

</ul>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Kuwait Civil ID Status Check By Call Service</h2>



<p>The PACI hotline number is&nbsp;<strong>1889988</strong>. Follow these steps to determine your Civil ID status</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Step 1</strong>: Call the <strong>PACI Hotline</strong> at (1889988).</li>



<li><strong>Step 2:</strong>&nbsp;To continue in <strong>English</strong>, <strong>press 2.</strong></li>



<li><strong>Step 3:</strong>&nbsp;Select <strong>Civil ID Services</strong>, <strong>press 1</strong></li>



<li><strong>Step 4:&nbsp;</strong>Then <strong>again</strong></li>
</ul>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Press 1 to check the status of your Civil ID renewal</li>



<li>Press 2 for civil ID inquiry – Enter your civil ID number, for example, 286052011xx.</li>



<li>If your Civil ID card is ready or under processing, it will tell you</li>



<li>To check a Civil ID card’s validity, press 3</li>
</ul>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Kuwait Civil ID Status Check By SMS Service</h2>



<p>By sending an SMS to&nbsp;<strong>1889988,</strong>&nbsp;you can check the status of your civil ID.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>For Renewal:</strong>&nbsp;Send SMS “<strong>R CivilIDNo</strong>” to&nbsp;<strong>1889988</strong></li>



<li><strong>For Inquiry:</strong>&nbsp;Send SMS “<strong>I CivilIDNo</strong>” to&nbsp;<strong>1889988</strong></li>



<li><strong>For&nbsp;Envelop inquiry:</strong>&nbsp;Send SMS “<strong>E receiptNO</strong>” to&nbsp;<strong>1889988</strong></li>
</ul>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Kuwait Civil ID Status Check By Voicemail</h2>



<p>Kuwaiti citizens, residents, and expatriates can inquire about their new civil card status by using the voicemail feature.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Call the customer service number&nbsp;<strong>188988</strong>.</li>



<li>Select Language and follow the instructions.</li>



<li>Click on 1 to go to the query service.</li>



<li>Type the ID number, then wait for the result.</li>
</ul>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Kuwait Civil ID Status Check MOI Service Center Offline</h2>



<p>You can officially check your Civil ID status by visiting the MOI (Ministry of Interior) office. For this, you need to go to a nearby MOI office where you will find a designated counter or window to verify your Civil ID status.</p>



<p>You will be required to present your Civil ID card and other identification documents, such as a passport or iqama. The office staff will scrutinize your documents and check your Civil ID status in the system.</p>



<p>They will provide you with accurate information regarding your validity, renewal status, or any updates. This is a traditional method that can still be used even after the introduction of the PACI website, but using the online method provides a better and more convenient way to check your Civil ID status.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Kuwait Civil ID Status Check By PACI Service Center Offline</h2>



<p>The process of checking your Civil ID Status at PACI Center is straightforward and takes only a few minutes. You need to do the following:</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Visit the PACI Center</h3>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>The Public Authority for Civil Information (PACI) operates several centers throughout Kuwait. To check your Civil ID status, you’ll need to visit one of these centers. Bring your original passport and any relevant documents.</li>
</ul>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Head to the Reception Desk</h3>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>When you arrive at the PACI Center, ask the receptionist to check your Civil ID status. You will need to fill out a form provided by the staff.</li>
</ul>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Fill out the Form</h3>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Your name, civil ID number, and passport number will be requested on the form. Fill out the form accurately, as any mistakes could delay the application.</li>
</ul>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Submit the Form</h3>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Submit the completed form to the reception desk once you’ve completed it. You will receive your Civil ID status after they process your request.</li>
</ul>



<p><strong>Your civil ID may still be pending if you see the following message.</strong></p>



<p>After getting the status You can wait a few more days for&nbsp;<a href="https://civilid-status.com/civil-id-delivery/">PACI Civil ID Delivery</a>,&nbsp;once it’s ready, you can collect it from Paci or you can have it delivered to your residence address, by&nbsp;<a href="https://civilid-status.com/civil-id-payment/">Civil ID Payment</a>&nbsp;which is only a 2KD delivery fee.</p>



<p>A civil registry application must be submitted to the General Directorate of Residency Affairs or via&nbsp;<a href="https://civilid-status.com/paci-online-appointment/">PACI Online Appointment</a>.&nbsp;Applicants are asked for personal information as well as their identification number.</p>



<p>The civil registry authority assigns the citizen a unique number. The number is used for all legal procedures, including enrollment in schools, embassies, government agencies, and other activities that require official identification. You can book Any Appointment in Kuwait by visiting&nbsp;<a href="https://metakuwaitkw.com/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Meta Kuwait Portal</a>.&nbsp;</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Kuwait Civil ID Status Check Online – Video Guide</strong></h2>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>What is Kuwait Civil ID?</strong></h2>



<p>The Kuwait Civil ID is the national identity card of Kuwaiti citizens that must be held by its citizens. This serves as the government identity for Kuwaiti citizens. Kuwait ID Card is includes personal information like:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Civil ID number</li>



<li>Your name</li>



<li>Nationality</li>



<li>Birth date</li>



<li>Sex</li>



<li>Card expiry date</li>
</ul>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">What is your Civil ID Number?</h2>



<p>After you have started the residency process in Kuwait and completed the visa and medical fitness test stages, you will receive a Civil ID number. If you have this number, you can check when you can pick up your Civil ID from PACI, as well as the status of your Civil ID.</p>



<p>You can also inquire about your Civil ID number with your company’s human resources department if you are on a work visa. Here is how you can check the status of your card once you have the number.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Who Can Use Kuwait Civil ID?</h2>



<p>All citizens and residents over the age of 5 with a valid civil ID with a validity period of more than one month. Residents and citizens over the age of 5 who renewed their civil identification and paid the issuance fee. The first civil ID card is being issued to new residents in Kuwait.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">How to Apply for Kuwait Civil ID Online</h2>



<p>Kuwait Civil ID Apply Online process in detail is explained in the article below the article to click the link and read the complete ID Apply online process.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Apply For New Civil ID</strong></h3>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-advancedbtn kb-buttons-wrap kb-btns2920_d42c77-d5"><a class="kb-button kt-button button kb-btn2920_e2bd61-89 kt-btn-size-standard kt-btn-width-type-auto kb-btn-global-fill kt-btn-has-text-true kt-btn-has-svg-false wp-block-kadence-singlebtn" href="https://civilid-status.com/how-to-apply-for-kuwait-civil-id-online/"><span class="kt-btn-inner-text"><strong>Apply For Civil ID Online</strong></span></a></div>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Please visit the Ministry of Information’s website.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Select “eServices” from the tabs.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Under “Citizen Services,” click “Apply for a National ID Card”.&nbsp;</li>



<li>The online application form must be completed and submitted.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Pay the due fees.&nbsp;</li>



<li>You need to wait until you receive your ID card.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Show your Kuwaiti passport and your ID card to a Civil ID office when your card arrives.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Fingerprints and photos will be taken at the office.&nbsp;</li>



<li>You must renew your ID card every ten years; the process is the same as when you first apply, except that you won’t have to pay the application fees.</li>
</ul>



<p class="has-text-align-center"><strong>A civil ID is ready for 7 days after application.</strong></p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Civil ID Renewal For Kuwait Individuals</h2>



<p>The Kuwait ID renewal service is available to individuals whose ID cards have expired. The renewal of civil cards for applicants under 18 can be done online, by phone, or with the help of a parent. Adults (18 years and older) can renew their cards directly, by phone, online, or through a parent.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Who is Eligible For Kuwait Civil ID</h2>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Kuwaiti nationals who are at least 18 years old and have acquired Kuwaiti nationality can renew their identification cards by phone or online. Candidates who still need to submit a scanned photo must provide a personal one.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Renewals of the card can be completed online or by phone for applicants under the age of 18. In this case, applicants aged 10 and older must provide a personal photograph.</li>
</ul>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Required Documents For Civil ID</h2>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Copy of Nationality Certificate.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Please submit a copy of the first and last pages of the nationality certificate, as well as the original document.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Colorful pictures of yourself that are 4 x 6 cm in size&nbsp;</li>



<li>Without your glasses, take pictures.&nbsp;</li>



<li>There should be a face between 2:2 cm and 2:5 cm long in the center of the photograph.&nbsp;</li>



<li>In military uniforms, pictures should never be taken.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Taking pictures for purposes other than assessing a face profile is advisable.&nbsp;</li>



<li>The color and clarity of the photo background should be fine.&nbsp;</li>



<li>The original civil ID.</li>



<li>Envelope.&nbsp;</li>



<li>When an applicant cannot attend in person, the Ministry of Justice must grant power of attorney.</li>
</ul>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">New Method For PACI Civil ID Inquiry</h2>



<p>Another way to find out the status of your Kuwait civil ID inquiry is to call the hotline at 1889988. Call this number and provide your ID number and other personal information to confirm your identity.</p>



<p>Your ID’s current status will be audible once you’ve done that. Note:&nbsp;The Kuwait Ministry of Interior requires Kuwait citizens to check their civil ID status online. However, there are still other ways to verify your status.</p>



<p>Consulate services are available at Kuwaiti consulates in countries where you reside. If you have any questions regarding your civil ID status, the experts there can assist you.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Kuwait Civil ID Key Features</h2>



<p>Kuwait’s new national eID card will be the main tool for verifying the identity and digital residence of its citizens. Kuwait’s extensive digital government efforts were made possible by this system, which helped streamline administrative processes and assist with digital government.</p>



<p>To fundamentally change how citizens and residents obtain basic services, it set an overarching goal. A few of the card’s main characteristics and advantages are as follows:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>The national eID card complies with Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) rules, enabling unrestricted travel between GCC members.&nbsp;</li>



<li>The safe document serves as an ID card, as well as providing overt and hidden security measures.&nbsp;</li>



<li>The contact functionality of the card gives cardholders access to eGovernment services with safety and ease.&nbsp;</li>



<li>Embedded contactless technology in Thales’ cards makes identity verification at border crossings more convenient, secure, and faster.</li>
</ul>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Repealing The Benefits Of Partnership</h2>



<p>Repealing The Benefits Of Partnership PACI Kuwait has built the infrastructure necessary to provide Kuwaitis with civil IDs/eIDs within the last few years. This platform has enabled public and commercial service providers around the country to create cutting-edge apps and services. </p>



<p>The involvement of Thales in this endeavor is a source of pride for the company. Kuwait’s best practices demonstrate the benefits of implementing a national ID card, particularly as a platform for creating smart cities. Kuwait has also demonstrated how trust in eGovernment can be increased through a reliable national identity card. The use of technology and digital administration is benefiting millions of Kuwaitis. Public institutions and services now provide Kuwaitis with a higher level of ease and comfort.</p>



<p>The involvement of Thales in this endeavor is a source of pride for the company. Kuwait’s best practices demonstrate the benefits of implementing a national ID card, particularly as a platform for creating smart cities. Kuwait has also demonstrated how trust in eGovernment can be increased through a reliable national identity card.</p>



<p>The use of technology and digital administration is benefiting millions of Kuwaitis. Public institutions and services now provide Kuwaitis with a higher level of ease and comfort.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Kuwait Civil ID Customer Care Number Details</h2>



<p>A Kuwait civil ID customer care number can be used to contact the authority for various purposes. For your problems you can contact them directly or via WhatsApp; they will be available to assist you. You can contact the Directorate General of Civil ID and Passports at&nbsp;<strong>+965 1804080</strong>&nbsp;if you have any inquiries or concerns regarding your civil identification card. Customer service for Kuwaiti civil ID will be available from&nbsp;<strong>10 a.m. to 6 p.m.</strong></p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>FAQs About Kuwait Civil ID Status</strong></h2>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-accordion alignnone"><div class="kt-accordion-wrap kt-accordion-id2920_807163-eb kt-accordion-has-8-panes kt-active-pane-0 kt-accordion-block kt-pane-header-alignment-left kt-accodion-icon-style-basic kt-accodion-icon-side-right" style="max-width:none"><div class="kt-accordion-inner-wrap" data-allow-multiple-open="false" data-start-open="0">
<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-1 kt-pane2920_0fb913-09"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong>How can I check my civil ID details in Kuwait?</strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>You can check your new civil card status using the voicemail feature, to determine if it’s still valid or if it needs to be renewed, and thus avoid paying late fees, by applying the following steps:</p>



<p></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>The customer service number is&nbsp;<strong>188988</strong>.</li>



<li>Select a language following the instructions.</li>



<li>Go to the query service by clicking on 1.</li>



<li>Write the civil number, then wait for the result</li>
</ul>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-2 kt-pane2920_4367ca-61"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong>How to check Iqama status in Kuwait with a passport number?</strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>To determine whether your Kuwaiti e-visa is genuine, you can take the following steps:</p>



<p></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Visit Kuwait’s official e-visa website</li>



<li>You need to enter your passport number and e-visa application number</li>



<li>Make sure the captcha code displayed is correct</li>



<li>click ‘submit’</li>
</ul>



<p><strong>Alternatively, if you do not know your passport number, you can:</strong></p>



<p></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>The Kuwait visa application status portal can be accessed here</li>



<li>enter your visa application number</li>



<li>enter the captcha displayed</li>



<li>click ‘submit’</li>
</ul>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-3 kt-pane2920_d6ad3a-6a"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong>How can I check my civil ID delivery in Kuwait?</strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>The ID cards are delivered within two working days after the delivery company picks them up from PACI headquarters. Unless the <strong>old civil ID</strong> is handed over to the delivery representative, the new civil card cannot be delivered.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-4 kt-pane2920_1b3be4-ac"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong><strong>How do I find my ID number?</strong></strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>Your identity numbers are printed on all your national identification documents, including passports, ID cards, and resident permits. You will usually find it either next to or below your name or your birth date. The number you are looking for should have 11 digits and contain your birthday formatted as year-month-date or date-month-year.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-5 kt-pane2920_0c48ec-ba"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong>How can I check my identity status?</strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>The most popular method is to visit the official government website online. The ID number and birthdate you entered can be used to check your status. Check your status at the nearest police station. There, you can check your status and, if necessary, change your details.<br></p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-6 kt-pane2920_106485-54"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong>How can I check my civil ID expiry date?</strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>There are several methods of requesting information about cases from the Ministry of Justice in Kuwait. Inquiries can be made by Kuwaiti Civil ID number, Kuwaiti electronic number, Public Prosecution case number, prosecution case number, court case number, referral number, and expert case number. Individuals can stay informed about the status of their cases through one of these methods.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-7 kt-pane2920_4cc45f-9e"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong>How to check Kuwait Civil ID status with passport number?</strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>check the civil ID status with the passport number in the following ways.</p>



<p></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>You can access Electronic Services by visiting the home page.</li>



<li>Select the option to inquire about the internal reference number.</li>



<li>Enter the date of issuance of nationality for Kuwaitis.</li>



<li>Please enter the passport number and expiration date for residents.</li>
</ul>
</div></div></div>
</div></div></div>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Conclusion</h2>



<p>We hope all the confusion about your Kuwait Civil ID status is clear. Please send any confusion to Kuwait Civil ID to Comment or Contact with <a href="https://web.facebook.com/Kuwait-Civil-ID-Status-110291158708344" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><strong>Facebook</strong></a>. For more detail go to the <a href="https://civilid-status.com/contact-us/"><strong>contact page</strong></a>. Thank You.</p>

                                if(typeof two_lazyLoadInstance === "undefined"){
                                    window.two_lazyLoadInstance = new LazyLoad({
                                          "callback_applied": function(element, instance){
                                                                let settings = instance._settings;
                                                                var bgDataValue = element.getAttribute("data-" + settings.data_bg_multi);
                                                                if (!bgDataValue) {
                                                                    return;
                                                                }
                                                                if(window.getComputedStyle(element).getPropertyValue("background-image") !== bgDataValue) {
                                                                    let style = element.getAttribute("style");
                                                                    style += "background-image: " + bgDataValue + " !important;";
                                                                    element.setAttribute("style", style);
                                                                }
                                                            }
                                   });
                                }else{
                                     two_lazyLoadInstance.update();
                                }
                                window.addEventListener("scroll", function() {
                                   if(two_lazyLoadInstance.toLoadCount>0){
                                      two_lazyLoadInstance.update();
                                   }
                                });
                                /*
                                 * Updates lazy-load instance from every ajax request
                                 * When we use Ajax requests and get pictures back, we need to update lazy-load instance
                                 * */
                                if (window.jQuery) {
                                    jQuery.ajaxSetup({
                                            complete: function() {
                                                two_lazyLoadInstance.update();
                                            }
                                        });
                                }
                            </script></body>
